reasoning: The knowledge cutoff is late October 2025, leaving only about two months for any newly announced rule to have an effective date in 2025. The crowd forecast was at 30% just ten days prior to the cutoff. Since no search tools are available to check for rumors or pending rulemakings in the last weeks of October, I rely heavily on the crowd forecast but apply a slight time-decay discount. Major export controls (like the October 2022 and 2023 rules) are sometimes published in the fall, which keeps the probability substantial, but the requirement for the effective date to fall in 2025 means any delay in publication or a 60-day compliance window would push the resolution to early 2026. Therefore, I adjust the crowd's 30% down to 28%.
